---
description: "Tao checklist van hanh Ngay/Tuan/Thang cho Admin va Nhan vien tu codebase"
name: "SOP Checklist Builder"
argument-hint: "Pham vi he thong hoac module can lap checklist van hanh"
agent: "GitBook Documentation Architect"
---
Muc tieu: Tao checklist van hanh thuc te cho he thong, phu hop role Admin va Nhan vien.

Dau vao tu nguoi dung:
- Pham vi: toan he thong hoac module cu the
- Neu co: tan suat mong muon (Ngay/Tuan/Thang)

Yeu cau:
1. Dua tren hanh vi thuc te cua codebase, khong suy doan tinh nang chua co.
2. Tach checklist theo role: Admin va Nhan vien.
3. Tach checklist theo tan suat: Hang ngay, Hang tuan, Hang thang.
4. Moi muc checklist phai co:
- Muc tieu
- Buoc thao tac
- Dau hieu thanh cong
- Cach xu ly neu that bai
5. Danh dau muc nao la bat buoc truoc gio mo cua.

Dinh dang bat buoc:
1. Pham vi checklist
2. Role Matrix (Admin/Nhan vien)
3. Checklist hang ngay
4. Checklist hang tuan
5. Checklist hang thang
6. Tinh huong canh bao va huong xu ly nhanh
